sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53389" key="karo/kerkos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρόκερκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of constellation, <sense id="n53389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Head and Tail</tr_> of Dragon (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Οὐροβόρος</etym>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
